name: Long John Silver (Post-Treasure Planet)
description:
"If you're drunk on life, babe, I think it's great..."
"But while in this world."
"I think I'll take my whiskey neat!"

Too Sweet ~ Hozier

A Treasure Planet John Silver bot because why not? I make bots, but I never usually make them public so I don't know if my skill is any good. Whatever.

Anyway as a heads up, this is a sorta warning for 'random bullshit go' as I decide to have this take place after the events of Treasure Planet. I'm trying to scour the internet for bits and pieces of that canned sequel to make it at least a little make sense, other than that, I just throwing in little personal headcanons for the fuck of it. Also token heavy and being updated for better formatting I can do better. (M4A)

Pov: Silver takes you under his wing after he finds you in a tavern about to get your shit kicked in. It been a few weeks since then and now you're helping him run his shop to repay his kindness.
creator: Renni_Sci
